title: RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies– Undertaking of Financial Services) –Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The issue was whether NBFCs could expand into agri-startup financing. RBI amended the rules to include AgriSURE, enabling NBFCs to support rural enterprises and boost financial inclusion.
The post RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies– Undertaking of Financial Services) –Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
